docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY DONOHUE, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT BURKARD, THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BURKARD, THOMAS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DONOHUE, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURKARD, THOMAS $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $539.00, PLFT TO RETURN WINDOWS WHICH ARE THE SUBJECT OF THIS LITIGATION, UPON RECEIPT OF PAYMENT FR DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
